summary.key_theme: 比特幣 ETF 持續獲得機構資金流入，儘管面臨地緣政治風險帶來的短期波動，但市場對其長期價值與機構採用率仍持樂觀態度。

bullish.title: Bitcoin Up 12% In 1 Week, Beats Gold For First Time In Months As ETFs Pour In $800 Million
bullish.reason: ETF 單週流入 8 億美元資金，且比特幣表現優於黃金，顯示資金配置轉向加密資產，對 IBIT 規模擴張有直接利多。

bullish.title: Institutional Accumulation: US Bitcoin ETFs and MicroStrategy Drive $1.2B Demand Surge
bullish.reason: 機構累計需求達 12 億美元，顯示大型資本對比特幣 ETF 的長期持有意願強勁，支撐 IBIT 價格底氣。

bullish.title: Bitcoin Tops $73,000 Despite Iran Airstrike Campaign: Is This Rally Sustainable?
bullish.reason: 在 3.2 億美元空單遭清算下，比特幣突破 73,000 美元，顯示市場多頭動能強勁，足以抵禦地緣政治衝擊。

bullish.title: Arthur Hayes: Bitcoin To $250,000 In 2026 And $750,000 In 2027 Because Trump Will 'Print Money'
bullish.reason: 知名投資人對比特幣長期價格預測極高，有助於提升市場對 IBIT 作為抗通膨資產的信心。

bullish.title: Bitcoin price rallies as Wall Street pours $462m into ETFs
bullish.reason: 華爾街單日流入 4.62 億美元，進一步驗證 ETF 作為機構進入加密貨幣市場主要管道的地位。

bullish.title: Shares of crypto-related stocks are trading higher amid gains in the price of Bitcoin.
bullish.reason: 比特幣價格站穩 65,000 美元支撐位，帶動相關資產走高，屬於市場情緒回穩的正面訊號。

bullish.title: Bitcoin ETFs See $458M Inflow: ‘Geopolitical Dip’ From Iran War?
bullish.reason: 市場將地緣政治引發的下跌視為買入機會，顯示投資人對於比特幣 ETF 的逢低承接意願。

bearish.title: Shares of crypto-related companies are trading lower amid ongoing volatility. The price of Bitcoin dropped to around $68,000.
bearish.reason: 比特幣回落至 68,000 美元，導致相關資產短期承壓，反映市場對波動性的擔憂。

bearish.title: Shares of crypto-related companies are trading lower amid a drop in the price of Bitcoin as Middle East tensions weigh on risk assets.
bearish.reason: 中東局勢緊張導致風險資產遭到拋售，比特幣作為風險資產之一受到短期負面影響。

bearish.title: Harvard Picks ETH USD After Trimming Bitcoin ETF Exposure
bearish.reason: 哈佛大學減持比特幣 ETF 部位轉向以太幣，雖規模不明，但顯示機構投資組合的資產輪動風險。

neutral.title: Morgan Stanley Picks Coinbase, BNY as Custodians for Planned Bitcoin ETF
neutral.reason: 摩根士丹利選擇託管機構屬於基礎設施建設，對 IBIT 本身股價無直接短期影響，但有利於產業長期合規化。

neutral.title: Bitcoin’s Wild Ride Makes This Options Strategy Strictly For Profit- and Thrill-Seekers
neutral.reason: 僅為針對波動率的選擇權操作建議，不影響 IBIT 的基本面價值。

neutral.title: Shares of crypto-related companies are trading higher amid a rebound in the price of Bitcoin to over $72,000
neutral.reason: 此新聞與其他報導比特幣突破 73,000 美元的新聞內容重疊，故選為中性觀察紀錄。
